$pre_registration: Frozen acceptance/kill gates for synthesis-as-consolidation. Committed to git BEFORE any synthesis feature code exists. The sha256 of this file is recorded in the commit message and in docs/roadmap/v0.9-synthesis-evaluation.md. Any change to a gate, threshold, arm, or workload invariant AFTER results are seen is a goalpost move and invalidates the evaluation; such a change must be a new lock file with a new hash and a new pre-registration commit, never an edit to this one.
feature_under_test: synthesis-as-consolidation (LLM-synthesized abstract `insight` memory from Hebbian-linked episodic clusters, retrieved via existing weighted ranking)
inspired_by_not_implementing: arXiv:2604.27707 â€” that paper prescribes weight-based consolidation, which KAOS deliberately does not do. This feature is better lookup, NOT weight-based generalization. The paper's compositional generalization ceiling is untouched and is out of scope for these gates.
no_feature_code_invariant: At the commit that introduces this file, no module named synthesis exists under kaos/dream/phases/ and no synthesis arm is implemented. Reviewers can verify via `git show <commit>:kaos/dream/phases/` not containing synthesis.py.

anti_self_deception_locks.L_grader_blind: All per-query correctness judgments run through kaos.metaharness.verifier.SurrogateVerifier, which by construction sees task + outputs but NOT which arm produced them and NOT the harness/feature source. The verifier is given a shuffled, arm-anonymized result stream.
anti_self_deception_locks.L_separate_agents: The workload-generating agent (writes episodic memory) and the query-generating agent (writes held-out questions) run in distinct KAOS sessions and import neither the synthesis module nor each other. The feature is not co-designed with the problem.
anti_self_deception_locks.L_judge_audited: The SurrogateVerifier / LLM-judge is spot-checked against human labels on a fixed 50-query sample (ids frozen in judge_audit_sample). If judgeâ€“human agreement < 0.85 Cohen's kappa, the entire run is VOID (not pass, not fail) and the judge must be fixed before re-running.
anti_self_deception_locks.L_gate_first: The harness must be built and demonstrated to be able to FAIL before any synthesis code is written. Concretely: run B0..B3 with the FULL arm stubbed to equal B0; the harness MUST emit [KILL: G1] (FULL cannot beat its own baseline). A harness in which the feature cannot lose is a broken harness and its later 'pass' is inadmissible.

workload_invariants.domain: Simulated multi-month multi-agent incident-response operation (~40 KAOS agents, simulated quarter, fake distributed system).
workload_invariants.episodic_memory_is_organic: Memory rows (observation/result/error/insight) are written by agents doing the simulated work. The associations memory<->memory graph forms from genuine co-retrieval via the existing inline Hebbian hooks. Clusters are DISCOVERED, never hand-placed. A workload that pre-places cluster boundaries is non-conformant and VOIDs the run.
workload_invariants.single_seeded_db_forked: One seeded workload DB (random.Random(seed), seed frozen in `seed`) is forked N ways; the ONLY variable across arms is the memory layer.
workload_invariants.distractor_clusters_present: At least 20% of clusters are traps: plausible-looking, whose naive summary is wrong. Punishes summarize-everything.
workload_invariants.temporal_contradiction_stream: Later incidents invalidate earlier root causes; correct insights must encode the resolved state.

query_classes.verbatim_recall: Sanity floor. Answer is literally present in one episode.
query_classes.compositional_multihop: Answer requires combining a generalization from cluster A AND one from cluster B; lexically absent from EVERY episode and from any single cluster.
query_classes.abstraction_only: Asks for the generalization; each episode individually consistent with several conclusions; cue and trigger are semantically disconnected (low surface similarity).
query_classes.tail_fact_probe: Decisive answer is a single rare detail inside a cluster; tests that consolidation did not wash out the tail.

workload_invariants.held_out_shift_split: A separate split with incident topics AND query templates unseen during ANY tuning of any arm. Topics+templates list frozen in shift_split_manifest and hashed.

arms.B0_no_synthesis: Weighted retrieval over raw episodes. The honest control.
arms.B1_nonllm_dedup: Jaccard near-duplicate collapse of a memory cluster (reusing consolidation._jaccard) + concatenation. No LLM. Isolates 'it is just dedup'.
arms.B2_keep_everything: Full episodic history in context, position-randomized to neutralize lost-in-the-middle.
arms.B3_cost_matched: Identical LLM token budget to FULL, spent on query expansion at retrieval time, not on consolidation. Isolates 'gain is the free LLM call'.
arms.L1_synth_never_retrieve: Synthesis writes insights; insight rows excluded from the FTS index. Isolates 'stored artifact is causal vs synthesis-time pass'.
arms.L2_random_insight: Retrieve a synthesized insight from an UNRELATED cluster. Controls for 'any extra text helps'.
arms.L3_answer_masked_synth: Eval-answer spans masked from source memories before synthesis. Leakage control.

gates.name: sanity floor
gates.predicate: every arm achieves >= 0.95 answer accuracy on verbatim_recall
gates.on_fail: VOID (broken harness or broken workload; protects against false negatives). Not a feature pass and not a feature fail.

gates.name: beats cheap baselines
gates.predicate: FULL accuracy minus max(B0, B1, B3) accuracy on (compositional_multihop UNION abstraction_only) >= 0.10, with bootstrap 95% CI of the difference excluding 0, n >= 200 per class

gates.name: the stored artifact is causal
gates.predicate: synthesized insights appear in retrieved top-K for >= 0.60 of the queries they help, AND lesion L1 reproduces <= 0.20 of FULL's gain over B0
gates.on_fail: feature REJECTED (gain is the synthesis-time call, not the stored abstraction; reframe required, do not ship as 'synthesis-as-consolidation')

gates.name: not merely the free LLM call
gates.predicate: FULL accuracy minus B3 accuracy on the same compositional+abstraction split >= 0.07

gates.name: survives distribution shift
gates.predicate: on held_out_shift_split, retained_gain = (FULL-B0 on shift) / (FULL-B0 in-distribution) >= 0.70, AND (FULL - B0) is strictly > 0 on EVERY query class on the shift split

gates.name: no leakage, no tail washout
gates.predicate: L3 (answer-masked synthesizer) retains >= 0.80 of FULL's gain over B0, AND tail_fact_probe accuracy for FULL is no more than 0.03 below B0

verdict_rule: Run is VOID if G0 fails or L_judge_audited fails. Otherwise the feature is ACCEPTED only if ALL of G1, G2, G3, G4, G5 pass. Failing any single kill gate REJECTS the feature outright. There is no retune-and-rerun: a rejected feature requires a new design, a new lock file, and a new pre-registration commit. The benchmark harness exits non-zero and prints [KILL: <gate id>] or [VOID: <reason>] accordingly; that exit code is the binding verdict.
expected_base_rate_disclosure: Per MemoryBench (arXiv:2510.17281) no advanced memory system reliably beats plain all-context RAG, and CTIM-Rover (arXiv:2505.23422) found distilled insights degraded agents by ~11 points. The prior probability that this feature passes all five kill gates is low. Rejection is the expected outcome and is a SUCCESSFUL evaluation, not a failed one.

templates.abstraction_only: across {d}, identify the recurring upstream trigger of a chain outage
templates.compositional_multihop: name the common upstream condition behind chain outages spanning {a} plus {b}
templates.verbatim_recall: recall the applied fix recorded for incident {iid}
templates.tail_fact_probe: state the odd port marker logged for incident {iid}

shift_split_manifest.note: topic (infra) AND template wording held out vs in_dist

frozen_manifests.note: v2: manifests FILLED. Gate thresholds, arms, verdict_rule, workload_invariants remain FINAL and byte-identical to v1. No other field changed. Committed before any FULL/synthesis run.

supersedes.reason: fill the two TO-BE-FILLED manifests ONLY; gates/arms/verdict_rule/workload_invariants byte-identical
